\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3551 introduces Concept Units Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \square \Psi = (\nabla \cdot \nabla)\Psi = \eta^{\mu\nu}\partial_\mu \partial_\nu \Psi \]
